ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "imdb_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie's IMDB page */,
  "poster_image" TEXT /* Link to the movie's poster image */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the movie director */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the movie */,
  "trailer_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie's trailer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "song_link" TEXT /* Link to the song on Spotify */,
  "artist_image" TEXT /* Link to the artist's picture */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the song */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the genre's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_song_links" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song linked to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_movie_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time when the movie was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_song_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time when the song was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_song_views_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_song_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie rated (NULL if song is rated) */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song rated (NULL if movie is rated) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_time" TEXT /* Time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie reviewed (NULL if song is reviewed) */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song reviewed (NULL if movie is reviewed) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was given */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time when the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_items" (
  "playlist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist item */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that the item belongs to */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the playlist (NULL if song is in the playlist) */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist (NULL if movie is in the playlist) */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the playlist */,
  "added_time" TEXT /* Time when the item was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_items_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_items_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_items_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
